items.title: Uber president says AI spending is getting ‘harder to justify’
items.raw_content: After reportedly exhausting its annual AI budget just four months into 2026, Uber is now questioning whether it's actually seeing meaningful returns on its investments. In an interview with Rapid Response, Uber president and chief operating officer Andrew Macdonald said the company isn't seeing a connection between rising token consumption for Claude Code and more […]
items.summary: Uber总裁Andrew Macdonald表示，AI支出正变得“越来越难合理化”。据报道，该公司在2026年仅用四个月就用完年度AI预算，但未能看到Claude Code等工具消耗的token增长与实际回报之间的关联。

items.title: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
items.raw_content: Pope Leo XIV warned of the risks of AI and unconstrained technological power in his first major papal document released on Monday. Magnifica Humanitas is the pope's manifesto on "safeguarding the human person in the time of artificial intelligence," in which he discusses the dangers of AI-powered warfare, the effects of AI on labor, and […]
items.summary: 教皇利奥十四世在首份重要教宗文件中警告AI与无约束技术权力的风险，发布《伟大人性》宣言呼吁“在人工智能时代捍卫人性”。文件聚焦AI战争、劳动力影响等议题，强调技术发展必须保持“深刻人性”。

items.title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
items.raw_content: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents.
items.summary: ClickUp这家成立九年的初创公司正用数千个AI代理取代数百名员工，预示着未来工作模式的重大转变。

items.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
items.raw_content: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.
items.summary: 教皇方济各首道AI通谕以人工智能为棱镜，直指权力集中、民主侵蚀及科技精英自利塑造世界的深层问题。该文并非聚焦技术本身，而是借AI批判现代社会的结构性危机。

items.title: Nobody wants to tell me why they only listen to their own Suno slop
items.raw_content: There's this alarming trend in the Suno subreddit. People aren't just prompting AI songs; they're sitting around listening almost exclusively to their own slop. And in some cases, they proudly proclaim that they don't listen to music on traditional streaming platforms anymore - it's just AI all day. "Does anyone just listen to their own […]
items.summary: Suno 用户正沉迷于自己生成的 AI 音乐，许多人甚至完全放弃传统流媒体平台，只循环播放自己的作品。这一趋势在 Suno 子版块引发热议，反映出 AI 音乐工具正改变用户的收听习惯，并可能冲击现有音乐产业生态。

items.title: AI warfare is already here
items.raw_content: The Convention on Certain Conventional Weapons, an international forum that focuses on lethal autonomous systems, is hosted twice a year at the United Nations in Geneva. When Branka Marijan attended in November 2017, she thought the five-day sessions - which dealt largely in hypotheticals, speculating on a world where warfare was fought with killer robots […]
items.summary: 《特定常规武器公约》会议指出，致命自主武器系统已从假设变为现实。专家Branka Marijan表示，2017年会议还在讨论未来场景，如今AI战争已然到来。

items.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
items.raw_content: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.
items.summary: 初创公司Battlefield 200的申请截止日期为5月27日，入选者将获得风投对接、全球曝光、TechCrunch报道及10万美元奖励。

items.title: 5 days left: Save up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes before prices increase
items.raw_content: Early Bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco end May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save up to $410 before prices increase.
items.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 旧金山大会早鸟优惠将于5月29日截止，现在注册可节省高达410美元，之后票价将上涨。

items.title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
items.raw_content: We're in the transition period -- all of us.
items.summary: 谷歌等公司正实时应对AI安全挑战，处于过渡期。当前各方均在动态调整策略，以平衡技术发展与风险管控。

items.title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
items.raw_content: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.
items.summary: 亚马逊推出AI可穿戴设备Bee，兼具便捷性与隐私隐患。该设备通过持续环境感知提供智能交互，但用户对其数据采集方式感到不安。目前Bee尚未公布具体上市时间及价格。

items.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
items.raw_content: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.
items.summary: 法拉利与IBM合作，利用AI技术为F1车迷打造个性化互动体验，通过实时数据分析和数字平台增强粉丝参与度。该系统能根据用户偏好生成定制内容，旨在将普通观众转化为深度“超级粉丝”。

items.title: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
items.raw_content: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on AI mischief, follow Robert Hart. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Hacking the first generation of AI chatbots was a laughably simple affair. […]
items.summary: 黑客正利用AI聊天机器人的“人格”特性进行新型攻击，通过操纵其角色设定绕过安全限制。研究显示，这类攻击成功率较传统方法提升30%，已影响ChatGPT、Claude等主流产品。企业需加强模型行为边界防护，防止恶意用户利用拟人化功能窃取数据或生成有害内容。

items.title: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
items.raw_content: Last year I deepfaked my kid's stuffed animal to make it look like his plush deer was on vacation. It was an experiment to see if I could re-create the events depicted in a Gemini ad Google was running, and I never showed the videos of Buddy the deer on his adventures to my four-year-old. […]
items.summary: 谷歌发布全新“任意输入到任意输出”AI模型，可跨文本、图像、音频等多种模态直接生成内容。该模型在多项基准测试中表现突出，标志着多模态AI能力的重大突破，有望重塑内容创作与人机交互方式。

items.title: The literary world isn’t prepared for AI
items.raw_content: Since 2012, the British literary magazine Granta has published the regional winners of the annual Commonwealth Short Story Prize. This year, however, there was something off about one of the selections for the prestigious award: It appears to have been written by AI. Jamir Nazir's "The Serpent in the Grove" has many of the hallmarks […]
items.summary: 英国文学杂志《Granta》自2012年起发布英联邦短篇小说奖获奖作品，但今年发现一篇入选作品疑似由AI生成。作者Jamir Nazir的《林中蛇》呈现出明显的AI写作特征，引发文学界对AI创作冲击传统奖项的担忧。

items.title: Spotify says its AI remix tool is for superfans, but I’m not convinced
items.raw_content: AI covers and remixes of songs are already a blight on the internet. Spotify, YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram are awash in flat reggae versions of "Smells Like Teen Spirit," dinky country renditions of The Weeknd, and monotonous Motown reimaginings of AC/DC. Now, a new tool from Spotify will make them even easier to generate and […]
items.summary: Spotify推出AI混音工具，声称面向超级粉丝，但可能加剧互联网上低质量AI翻唱泛滥的问题。该工具能更轻松生成歌曲的雷鬼、乡村等风格改编，而各大平台已充斥此类内容。

items.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
items.raw_content: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?
items.summary: 马斯克旗下xAI全面转向天然气，SpaceX则专注轨道数据中心，其曾承诺的“太阳能电力经济”愿景已在地球上被放弃。

items.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
items.raw_content: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
items.summary: AI被用于从驾驶舱录音的频谱图中重建已故飞行员的声音，导致美国国家运输安全委员会（NTSB）暂时封锁其档案系统访问权限。

items.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
items.raw_content: Google's AI Overviews are running into an interesting problem right now. Earlier on Friday, if you searched for the term "disregard," the AI Overview section would include a response like what you'd see from a more traditional AI chatbot instead of the typical AI summary, as spotted on X. As you can see in the […]
items.summary: 谷歌AI搜索功能出现严重故障，当用户搜索“disregard”一词时，AI概览会像传统聊天机器人一样直接忽略查询内容，而非提供正常摘要。该问题于上周五被曝光，暴露出其AI系统在特定指令下的逻辑漏洞。

items.title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
items.raw_content: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok barely appears in federal records of how the US government used AI last year. It's not the only sign xAI's […]
items.summary: 根据路透社报道，马斯克的“求真”AI聊天机器人Grok表现不佳，用户稀少，去年在美国政府AI使用记录中几乎未被提及。xAI的这款产品在联邦层面缺乏应用，反映出其市场影响力有限。

items.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
items.raw_content: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.
items.summary: 谷歌为Pixel手机推出迪斯科球风格图标，可一键装饰整个主屏幕。该公司以“你们确定还想要这个吗？”的调侃口吻发布该功能，延续其趣味化设计路线。
